pi_items.source: Task metadata - expected commission header name
Claimed to be a business partner in GardenWorld; no verification found in iDempiere documentation, GitHub, or community forums
Claimed to be a product category in GardenWorld; no verification found in iDempiere documentation or sample data references
Represents 5% commission rate; valid multiplier amount field in iDempiere c_commissionline table (amtmultiplier column)
Represents 10% commission rate; valid multiplier amount field in iDempiere c_commissionline table (amtmultiplier column)
Export_result.sh queries c_currency.iso_code; USD is valid ISO 4217 currency code; verified in verifier.py line 73
verifier.py checks frequencytype='Q' for Quarterly; found in c_commission.frequencytype field referenced in export_result.sh; iDempiere documentation confirms quarterly frequency support
verifier.py checks docbasistype='I' for Invoice; found in c_commission.docbasistype field; iDempiere documentation confirms Invoice, Order, and Receipt as calculation basis options
verifier.py checks listdetails='Y'; found in c_commission.listdetails field in export_result.sh query

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a sales commission plan in iDempiere 12 using the GardenWorld sample database. The commission rates (5% and 10%) are valid iDempiere multiplier amounts. The configuration uses verified iDempiere settings: Invoice-based calculation (docbasistype='I'), Quarterly frequency (frequencytype='Q'), USD currency (ISO code), and List Details enabled (listdetails='Y'). These represent standard valid iDempiere commission plan configurations. However, the business partner 'Joe Block' and product category 'Patio Furniture' could not be verified to exist in GardenWorld documentation or public iDempiere sources, making their availability as selectable options unconfirmed.
